en.title: Dialogue Flow
en.summary: Visual map of the test call path. Edit workflow-data.json to change the workflow, audio files, prompts, and yes/no routing.
en.loadError: Could not load workflow-data.json. Open this page through the test server instead of file explorer.

zh.title: 對話流程
zh.summary: 測試電話流程圖。修改 workflow-data.json 就可以改流程、音檔、提示詞、以及 yes/no 的下一步。
zh.loadError: 無法載入 workflow-data.json。請用 test server 開啟，不要直接用檔案總管開。

customer.Company: Shang Jin Japanese Korean Language School
customer.Terminate_condition: End the conversation when the customer clearly refuses the course or says they no longer need more information.
customer.Agreee_condition: End the conversation when the customer is interested in the course and wants to learn more or purchase. A human customer service representative will continue service.
customer.Ending: Thank you for your time. We look forward to providing better service.

default: You are a helpful and friendly voice assistant.
Have a normal, natural conversation with the user.
Reply clearly and conversationally. Keep replies concise unless the user asks for detail.
Your spoken reply will also be shown as text in the web UI.
If the user confirms they are the intended customer, include this natural phrase in your reply: I'll give you a quick overview.
If the user says they are not the intended customer or clearly rejects the call, include this natural phrase in your reply: Sorry to bother you.
If the conversation reaches a clear ending or handoff, include this natural phrase in your reply: Thank you for your time.
test: The browser plays all dialogue audio locally. Do not produce spoken assistant audio.
Your only job is to classify the user's latest spoken answer for the current step.
If the latest answer contains an appointment time, return exactly one line using this format instead of yes/no: yyyy/mm/dd hh:mm | specified time OR yyyy/mm/dd hh:mm | not specified time
Use 24-hour time. Infer relative dates from today's local date and time: {{localNow}}
Examples: tomorrow afternoon 2 -> tomorrow at 14:00 | specified time. tomorrow noon -> tomorrow at 12:00 | not specified time. now -> today's current local time | not specified time.
If the user agrees, confirms, accepts, says yes, or says phrases like yes, correct, ok, sure, reply with exactly: yes
If the user rejects, disagrees, is not the person, is not interested, says no, reply with exactly: no
If the answer is unclear, reply with exactly: unclear
Do not explain your decision and do not add any other words.
time: The browser plays all dialogue audio locally. Do not produce spoken assistant audio.
Your only job is to identify the appointment time from the user's latest spoken answer.
Return exactly one line using this format: yyyy/mm/dd hh:mm | specified time OR yyyy/mm/dd hh:mm | not specified time
Today's local date and time is: {{localNow}}
If the user gives a relative date or time, infer it from today's local date and time above.
If the user gives an exact hour or minute, append: | specified time
If the user gives a broad or relative time without a specific hour, append: | not specified time
If the user says now, right now, immediately, or asks if now is okay, return today's date and the current local time, then append: | not specified time
If the user says noon without a date, return today's date at 12:00 unless noon has already passed, then return tomorrow at 12:00, then append: | not specified time
If the user says tomorrow without a specific time, return tomorrow at 12:00, then append: | not specified time
If the user says later without a specific time, return today's date one hour after the current local time, then append: | not specified time
If the user says afternoon, evening, or tonight without a specific hour, use 15:00 for afternoon and 19:00 for evening, then append: | not specified time
If the date is missing but the time is clear, use today's date unless the time has already passed, then use tomorrow, then append: | specified time
Only reply unclear when there is no usable time, date, relative time, or broad period.
Do not explain your decision and do not add any other words.

detail.en: User clicks Test. Browser prepares the Realtime analysis session.
detail.zh: 使用者按下 Test，瀏覽器準備 Realtime 分析 session。

detail.en: Set instruction mode to test. Start voice session if it is not ready.
detail.zh: 設定 instruction mode 為 test。如果 voice session 還沒準備好，就啟動它。

data.prompt: Test dialogue mode is active. Classify the latest spoken answer.

detail.en: Play hi.wav and wait for the customer to confirm identity.
detail.zh: 播放 hi.wav，等待客戶確認是不是本人。

data.prompt: Step 1: played hi.wav. Waiting for identity confirmation.

detail.en: If the answer is no, play bye.wav and stop the test flow.
detail.zh: 如果回答 no，播放 bye.wav 並停止測試流程。

data.prompt: AI detected no for identity. Ending conversation.

detail.en: Play intro.wav and wait for program interest confirmation.
detail.zh: 播放 intro.wav，等待客戶確認是否對課程有興趣。

data.prompt: Step 2: played intro.wav. Waiting for program interest confirmation.

detail.en: If the answer is no, play bye.wav and stop the test flow.
detail.zh: 如果回答 no，播放 bye.wav 並停止測試流程。

data.prompt: AI detected no for interest. Ending conversation.

detail.en: Play time_inquiry.wav and switch to appointment time extraction.
detail.zh: 播放 time_inquiry.wav，切換成預約時間擷取模式。

data.prompt: Step 3: played time_inquiry.wav. Waiting for appointment time. Accept exact times and broad answers like now, noon, tomorrow, later, afternoon, or tonight. Return yyyy/mm/dd hh:mm | specified time for exact hours, or yyyy/mm/dd hh:mm | not specified time for broad/relative answers.

detail.en: If the answer is unclear or invalid, replay the current audio prompt.
detail.zh: 如果回答不清楚或時間格式無效，就重播目前的音檔提示。

data.prompt: AI returned unclear or could not extract a valid appointment time. Replaying the current audio.

detail.en: Store the parsed datetime, play ok.wav, and end the test flow.
detail.zh: 儲存解析後的時間，播放 ok.wav，然後結束測試流程。

data.prompt: Appointment time saved. Played ok.wav and ended conversation.
data.stores: datetime, specified time / not specified time, raw
